docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY NIKAS, NICOLE AS TO DEFENDANT MORRIS, CAYLYN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-27-2026 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-13-2026, PERSONAL SERVICE, SERVICE FEE: $76.00 AS TO DEFENDANT MORRIS, CAYLYN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-27-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-27-2026 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JAMES CHANG. PLAINTIFF NICOLE NIKAS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CAYLYN MORRIS IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JAMES CHANG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
STIPULATION TO ALLOW THE CASE TO BE HEARD BY A JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY NIKAS, NICOLE MORRIS, CAYLYN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-27-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NIKAS, NICOLE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORRIS, CAYLYN $2,450.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,450.00, PER AGREEMENT OF THE PARTIES. PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE AT THE RATE OF $50 PER MONTH BEGINNING ON MAY 01, 2026 AND ON THE 1ST DAY OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER UNTIL PAID IN FULL. IF ANY PAYMENT IS MISSED, THE ENTIRE BALANCE BECOMES DUE IMMEDIATELY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
